name: Collaborative Editor
description: Real-time collaborative level editor for Geometry Dash. Work together with friends to create amazing levels!

update-frequency.name: Update Frequency
update-frequency.description: How often cursor and object updates are sent (updates per second).

low-lag-mode.name: Low Lag Mode
low-lag-mode.description: Reduces update frequency for better performance on slow connections.

auto-color-assignment.name: Auto Color Assignment
auto-color-assignment.description: Automatically assign unique colors to players when they join.

chat-history-size.name: Chat History Size
chat-history-size.description: Maximum number of chat messages to keep in memory.
